title: United Jet Hits Pole, Truck During Newark Landing Approach
title_cn: 联合喷气机在纽瓦克着陆过程中撞上杆子和卡车
summary: A United Airlines Holdings Inc. plane grazed a vehicle and light post on an adjacent highway in its final approach to Newark Liberty International Airport on Sunday, the latest in a string of incidents that have put the spotlight on aviation safety in the US.

summary: Source: Bloomberg, 5:14

title: Supreme Court for Now Restores Abortion Pill Access by Mail
title_cn: 最高法院现在恢复通过邮寄方式获取堕胎药
summary: The US Supreme Court temporarily restored the ability of patients to get a widely used abortion pill by mail, pausing a ruling that required people to visit a healthcare provider.

summary: JPMorgan Chase & Co. hired Will Boyle from Morgan Stanley to lead its team that advises private equity firms on structuring private deals, as the bank looks to build out its capital advisory business for sponsors.

title: GameStop Makes $56 Billion Bid for eBay, Four Times Its Size
title_cn: GameStop 出价 560 亿美元收购 eBay，规模是其规模的四倍
summary: GameStop Corp. is trying to buy eBay Inc. for about $56 billion in cash and stock, a bold attempt by Ryan Cohen to take over a storied e-commerce name several times larger.

title: Cerebras Leads Crop of IPOs Rushing to Tap Market Before SpaceX
title_cn: Cerebras 引领大量 IPO 抢在 SpaceX 之前开拓市场
summary: A cluster of companies led by artificial-intelligence chipmaker Cerebras Systems Inc. started formally marketing their US IPOs Monday, as firms weighing second-quarter debuts look to get ahead of SpaceX’s potentially record-breaking listing.

title: Stock Movers: Gamestop, Norwegian Cruise Line, TSN  (Podcast)
title_cn: 库存推动者：Gamestop、挪威邮轮公司、TSN（播客）

title_cn: 最高法院暂时恢复堕胎药的使用
summary: Source: Bloomberg, 0:00

title: Single Best Idea: Stuart Kaiser & John Sterling (Podcast)
title_cn: 单一最佳创意：Stuart Kaiser 和 John Sterling（播客）
summary: Source: Bloomberg, 3:00

title: US and Iran Trade Fire in Gulf, Shaking Four-Week Ceasefire
title_cn: 美国和伊朗在海湾交火，动摇了为期四个星期的停火
summary: The US and Iran exchanged fire in the Persian Gulf in a flareup of violence on Monday that also drew in the United Arab Emirates, prompting calls for renewed strikes on Iranian targets and casting doubt on the fate of a four-week ceasefire.

title: Gold Falls as Flare-Up of Hormuz Tensions Fuels Inflation Risks
title_cn: 霍尔木兹紧张局势升级加剧通胀风险，金价下跌
summary: Gold fell as escalating Middle East tensions threaten a ceasefire between the US and Iran, keeping energy prices elevated and fueling inflation risks.

title: US Driller Diamondback Raising Output ‘Immediately’ on Oil Rally
title_cn: 美国钻井公司Diamondback因油价上涨而“立即”提高产量
summary: Diamondback Energy Inc., one of the leading independent shale oil producers in the US, is raising output in response to rising prices caused by the Iran war.

title: FedEx, UPS Shares Sink on ‘Watershed’ Amazon Logistics Move
title_cn: 联邦快递和联合包裹服务公司股价因亚马逊物流举措的“分水岭”而下跌
summary: US transportation stocks plunged Monday after Amazon.com Inc. announced expanded logistics offerings that will turn it into a major competitor for parcel carriers and air freight companies, and also impact truckers and third-party brokers.

title: Musk Agrees to Pay $1.5 Million to Settle SEC Twitter Stake Case
title_cn: 马斯克同意支付 150 万美元和解 SEC Twitter 股权案
summary: Elon Musk agreed to settle Securities and Exchange Commission allegations that he cheated Twitter shareholders out of millions of dollars in 2022 by failing to properly disclose his growing stake in the social media company.

title: Yen’s Brief Spike Leaves Traders on Alert for Intervention
title_cn: 日元短暂飙升让交易者警惕干预
summary: A sudden surge in the yen ensured traders remained on edge over the potential for Japanese authorities to step back into the market after last week’s intervention to curb declines.

title: US Stocks Fall From Record High With Mideast Tensions in Focus
title_cn: 中东紧张局势成为焦点，美股从历史高位回落
summary: The S&P 500 Index retreated from a historic high on Monday as investors monitored developments in the Middle East and geared up for another busy earnings stretch after solid results helped drive the gauge higher the past five weeks.

title: Pretium CEO: Capital for Home Construction is Drying up
title_cn: Pretium首席执行官：住宅建设资金正在枯竭
summary: Pretium CEO Don Mullen discusses the impacts of the 21st Century Road to Housing Act, home construction capital drying up, and the need to speed up homebuilding. He talks with Katie Greifeld and Romaine Bostick at the Milken Institute Global Conference in Beverly Hills, California. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: SEC Investigating Alleged Fraud in Private Credit, Atkins Says
title_cn: 阿特金斯表示，美国证券交易委员会正在调查私人信贷欺诈指控
summary: Securities and Exchange Commission Chairman Paul Atkins said the agency is investigating allegations of fraud in private credit firms, though he declined to say specifically which companies are under scrutiny.

title: Stocks Fall, Oil Rises on Hormuz Tension Flare-Up: Markets Wrap
title_cn: 霍尔木兹紧张局势加剧，股市下跌，油价上涨：市场总结
summary: A rally in oil drove both stocks and bonds lower on concerns that an escalation of hostilities over the Strait of Hormuz will keep energy costs elevated, fueling global inflation risks.

title: US 30-Year Yield Hits 5% as Oil Surge Fuels Bets on a Fed Hike
title_cn: 油价飙升助长美联储加息押注 美国 30 年期国债收益率触及 5%
summary: Treasuries fell, sending 30-year yields to the highest since July, as traders boosted wagers that the Federal Reserve will  have to reserve course and raise interest rates to curb inflation following a surge in oil prices.

title: Europe Is Facing Stagflationary Shock, EU’s Dombrovskis Says
title_cn: 欧盟委员会主席东布罗夫斯基斯表示，欧洲正面临滞胀冲击
summary: European Union Economy Commissioner Valdis Dombrovskis warned of the stagflationary effect that the Iran war is creating for the bloc.

title: Tom Brady & Linda Yaccarino on Startup eMed, GLP-1s
title_cn: Tom Brady 和 Linda Yaccarino 谈初创公司 eMed、GLP-1
summary: Former NFL Quarterback Tom Brady & eMed CEO Linda Yaccarino discuss investment in health startup eMed, soaring GLP-1 weight-loss drug costs, and how to evaluate business opportunities as a well-known former athlete. They speak with Katie Greifeld and Romaine Bostick at the Milken Institute Global Conference in Beverly Hills, California. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Beef Processors in Spotlight as DOJ Confirms Antitrust Probe
title_cn: 美国司法部确认反垄断调查，牛肉加工商成为焦点
summary: The US Justice Department confirmed it was investigating potential antitrust violations in the meatpacking industry amid soaring domestic beef prices and a shrinking cattle herd.

title: Bolivia Plots First Global Bond Sale After Four-Year Hiatus
title_cn: 玻利维亚计划在中断四年后首次发行全球债券
summary: Bolivia is gauging investor interest for its first dollar bond sale in four years after the new market-friendly government avoided a default on external debt payments in March.

title: Treasury Market on Watch for Shift in Yellen-Era Debt Plan
title_cn: 国债市场关注耶伦时代债务计划的转变
summary: Wednesday will amount to a sort of Groundhog Day for US bond dealers, who will — as has been the case for more than a year now — be watching for any change in guidance from the Treasury in its latest plan for debt issuance.

title: Maersk Vessel Exits Persian Gulf Under US Military Escort
title_cn: 马士基船舶在美国军事护航下离开波斯湾
summary: Maersk said that its commercial vessel the Alliance Fairfax was among US-flagged ships that transited the Strait of Hormuz with assistance from the US military on Monday.

title: Oil Surges After Iran Strikes Energy Facility in UAE’s Fujairah
title_cn: 伊朗袭击阿联酋富查伊拉能源设施后油价飙升
summary: Oil prices jumped as critical energy infrastructure and tankers in the Middle East came under attack, marking a significant escalation in the US-Iran hostilities and jeopardizing a four-week-old ceasefire.

title: Rheinmetall Sales Miss Estimates as Revenues Shift Into 2Q
title_cn: 随着收入进入第二季度，莱茵金属销售额未达预期
summary: Rheinmetall AG reported preliminary first-quarter sales of about €1.9 billion that missed the average analyst estimate of about €2.3 billion as Germany’s biggest defense firm gears up for a year of executing on major orders from Europe and beyond.

title: KPS Snaps Up Oldcastle Bonds to Secure Hand in Debt Overhaul
title_cn: KPS 收购 Oldcastle 债券以确保参与债务重组
summary: Private equity firm KPS Capital Partners is buying the discounted debt of its own company, Oldcastle BuildingEnvelope, in a bid to secure the upper hand in the glass giant’s looming financial overhaul.

title: Chevron ‘Concerned’ Over Hormuz Transit as US, Iran Trade Fire
title_cn: 美国与伊朗交火之际，雪佛龙“担心”霍尔木兹过境
summary: Chevron Corp. is concerned about the safe passage of ships through the Strait of Hormuz as the US attempts to restore transit through the strategic Persian Gulf waterway, said Chief Executive Officer Mike Wirth.

title: SEC Drops Accounting Fraud Case Against Ex-Iconix CEO
title_cn: SEC 撤销针对 Iconix 前首席执行官的会计欺诈案
summary: The Securities and Exchange Commission will drop a long-running lawsuit against the founder of apparel licenser Iconix Brand Group that accused him of inflating the company’s revenue and earnings more than a decade ago.

title: Kalshi Grilled by Massachusetts High Court Over What Gambling Is
title_cn: 卡尔希被马萨诸塞州高等法院盘问什么是赌博
summary: The Massachusetts Supreme Court appeared skeptical of Kalshi Inc.’s claim that its prediction markets don’t fall under state gambling laws because the company is instead providing financial arrangements between people using “swap” contracts on events like sports.

title: Fed’s Williams Says Rates Will Need to Be Lower ‘At Some Point’
title_cn: 美联储威廉姆斯表示“在某个时候”需要降低利率
summary: Federal Reserve Bank of New York President John Williams said interest rates will need to come down “at some point” if inflation returns to the US central bank’s 2% target, as he expects.

title: Electronic Muni Bond Trading Hits Record Levels in First Quarter
title_cn: 第一季度电子市政债券交易创下历史新高
summary: Digital trading of municipal bonds hit a record in the first quarter of 2026, an encouraging development for an asset class that has been slower than others in adopting electronic venues.

title: Man Group CEO: Economic Pain in Europe Worse than US
title_cn: 英仕曼集团首席执行官：欧洲经济痛苦比美国更严重
summary: Man Group CEO Robyn Grew discusses the market impacts of the Iran War in both the US and Europe, and why we are beginning to see a shift toward diverse and resilient portfolios. She speaks with Katie Greifeld and Romaine Bostick at the Milken Institute Global Conference in Beverly Hills, California. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Palantir Looks to Prove It Doesn’t Belong in Software Selloff
title_cn: Palantir 希望证明自己不属于软件抛售领域
summary: Palantir Technologies Inc. heads into its first-quarter earnings with something to prove to investors: That it’s been wrongly caught up in the selloff that has gripped software stocks for months.

title: JPMorgan Sees Higher NYC Downgrade Risk Amid Tax Pushback
title_cn: 摩根大通认为纽约市因税收推迟而面临更高的降级风险
summary: New York City’s risk of seeing a credit-rating downgrade has increased, according to JPMorgan Chase & Co. strategists.

title: GameStop’s ‘Highly Confident’ $20 Billion TD Letter Echoes Drexel
title_cn: GameStop“高度自信”的 200 亿美元道明信函与德雷克赛尔相呼应
summary: GameStop Corp.’s audacious $56 billion bid for eBay Inc. is relying on a tactic made famous by the corporate raiders of the 1980s to help prove it has the means to carry out the deal — if not the cash in hand.

title: Brightline West Bondholders Give Company More Time to Raise Cash
title_cn: Brightline West 债券持有人为公司提供更多时间筹集现金
summary: Investors holding $1.8 billion of bonds to finance Brightline West, a high-speed rail line between Southern California and Las Vegas, are asserting more control of the project after giving the railroad three more months to inject capital.

title: Palantir Beats on Revenue Outlook, Misses on Commercial Sales
title_cn: Palantir 收入前景好于商业销售
summary: Palantir Technologies Inc. issued a better-than-expected revenue outlook for the year, even while posting disappointing US commercial sales in the first quarter.

title: BNY CEO: AI Helps 'Turbocharge' Business
title_cn: 纽约银行首席执行官：人工智能帮助“涡轮增压”业务
summary:
BNY CEO Robin Vince discusses the impacts of AI on business, including product improvement, operational efficiency, and providing cost cutting for clients. He talks with Katie Greifeld and Romaine Bostick at the Milken Institute Global Conference in Beverly Hills, California.
 (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Janus Henderson CEO 'Energized' About Trian Deal
title_cn: Janus Henderson 首席执行官对 Trian 交易“充满活力”
summary: Janus Henderson CEO Ali Dibadj says the firm is “energized” about the Trian deal, which will allow for investment in technology and AI to improve performance. He also talks about plans to launch US ETF products in the global market. He speaks with Katie Greifeld and Romaine Bostick at the Milken Institute Global Conference in Beverly Hills, California. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: GameStop's Cohen Sees New Target and Big Possible Payday in eBay
title_cn: GameStop 的科恩在 eBay 上看到了新的目标和可能的大收获
summary: The CEO who helped define the meme-stock era has proposed a brash, unsolicited $56 billion offer for the online commerce company.

title: GameStop’s $56 Billion Bid for eBay | Bloomberg Tech 5/4/2026
title_cn: GameStop 以 560 亿美元收购 eBay |彭博科技 2026 年 5 月 4 日
summary: Bloomberg’s Caroline Hyde discusses GameStop's $56 billion offer to buy eBay, a company four-times its size. Plus, AI chipmaker Cerebras is looking to raise as much as $3.5 billion in its upcoming IPO. And, OpenAI raises more than $4 billion for a new joint venture that aims to help businesses adopt its AI software. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Pinterest Jumps on Outlook Signaling Strong Advertising Growth
title_cn: Pinterest 的展望跃升，预示着广告的强劲增长
summary: Pinterest Inc. shares jumped almost 20% in extended trading after the company reported first-quarter sales that topped analyst estimates, and gave an outlook for revenue in the current period that was higher than anticipated.

title: EU in Talks With Anthropic to Get Banks Tested for Mythos Flaws
title_cn: 欧盟正在与 Anthropic 进行谈判，让银行接受神话缺陷测试
summary: The European Union is in talks with Anthropic PBC about getting its companies and banks tested for any vulnerabilities that the new Mythos AI model uncovers.

title: Take-Two CEO Says ‘Grand Theft Auto VI’ Expectations Are ‘Terrifying’
title_cn: Take-Two 首席执行官表示《侠盗猎车手 VI》的预期“令人恐惧”
summary: The upcoming video game is expected to be one of the biggest entertainment releases of all time

title: Thoma Bravo Is Combing Every BDC Book for Software Loan Bargains
title_cn: Thoma Bravo 正在梳理每本 BDC 书籍以获取软件贷款优惠
summary: Thoma Bravo brands itself as the world’s largest software-focused investment firm. And it’s only looking to get bigger in the space.

title: Trump Will Add ‘Many More’ Affordable Homes Says Housing Sec.
title_cn: 住房委员会表示，特朗普将增加“更多”经济适用房
summary: US Secretary of Housing and Urban Development Scott Turner discusses affordability and government efforts to cut regulation. He speaks with Bloomberg Balance of Power co-host Joe Mathieu from the Milken Institute Global Conference in Los Angeles.   (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Crypto Investor Haun Raises $1 Billion for New Funds
title_cn: 加密货币投资者 Haun 为新基金筹集 10 亿美元
summary: Crypto-focused investor Haun Ventures has raised $1 billion across new funds. CEO Katie Haun discusses the firm’s expansion into AI investments and opportunities in the agentic finance sector. She speaks with Caroline Hyde on “Bloomberg Tech.” (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Nvidia Backs DeepInfra in $107 Million Raise
title_cn: Nvidia 支持 DeepInfra 融资 1.07 亿美元
summary: Cloud inference platform DeepInfra closes a $107 million in Series B funding round, backed by the likes of Nvidia and Samsung, as it aims to tackle bottlenecks in AI compute. DeepInfra CEO Nikola Borisov speaks with Caroline Hyde on “Bloomberg Tech.” (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Brockman Says His Stake in OpenAI Worth Nearly $30 Billion
title_cn: 布罗克曼表示，他在 OpenAI 的股份价值近 300 亿美元
summary: OpenAI co-founder and President Greg Brockman said his stake in the startup is now worth nearly $30 billion, making him one of the larger individual shareholders in the ChatGPT maker.

title: Amazon Shipping Services Repackage Sparks UPS, FedEx Selloff
title_cn: 亚马逊运输服务重新包装引发 UPS 和联邦快递抛售
summary: Amazon.com Inc. unveiled a suite of logistics services that will let businesses buy its existing freight and distribution offerings as a package, sending shares of rival delivery companies such as FedEx Corp. and United Parcel Service Inc. lower.

title: Apple Plans to Let Users Build Their Own Passes in iOS 27 Wallet App
title_cn: 苹果计划让用户在 iOS 27 钱包应用程序中构建自己的通证
summary: Apple Inc. is preparing a new “Create a Pass” feature for its next major iPhone software update, allowing users to build and customize their own digital tickets and gift cards within the Wallet app.

title: FedEx, UPS Shares Sink on ‘Watershed’ Amazon Logistics Move
title_cn: 联邦快递和联合包裹服务公司股价因亚马逊物流举措的“分水岭”而下跌
summary: US transportation stocks plunged Monday after Amazon.com Inc. announced expanded logistics offerings that will turn it into a major competitor for parcel carriers and air freight companies, and also impact truckers and third-party brokers. Bloomberg's Lee Klaskow joins Bloomberg Intelligence to discuss. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: GameStop Makes $56 Billion Bid for eBay
title_cn: GameStop 出价 560 亿美元收购 eBay
summary: GameStop Corp. is trying to buy eBay Inc. for about $56 billion in cash and stock, a bold attempt by Ryan Cohen to take over a storied e-commerce name several times larger. Bloomberg's Spencer Soper joins Bloomberg Intelligence to discuss. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Apple’s Outlook Boosted by High-Income Demand with Julie Ask
title_cn: Julie Ask 的高收入需求提振了苹果公司的前景
summary: Julie Ask, a tech futurist and advisor specializing in consumer behavior, discusses the robust demand for Apple products among the company's affluent customer base. She highlights that despite broader market challenges, high-income consumers remain eager to purchase key Apple devices such as the iPhone, iPad, and Mac. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Apollo’s Zito Calls Credit Safer Bet in High-Volatility Times
title_cn: Apollo 的 Zito 称信贷在高波动时期是更安全的选择
summary: Apollo Global Management Inc.’s John Zito argued private credit is the safer place for investors to be even as the rise of artificial intelligence is dramatically shifting the environment for “the whole ecosystem of investing.”

title: Brockman Says Musk Vowed on Trial’s Eve to Make Him ‘Hated’
title_cn: 布罗克曼称马斯克在审判前夕发誓要让他“被讨厌”
summary: OpenAI President Greg Brockman says Elon Musk messaged him just before they faced off in a trial to talk about settling their fight — and then vowed to ruin his reputation.

title: Blue Apron’s Meal Maker Files Bankruptcy After Recalls
title_cn: Blue Apron 的餐机在召回后申请破产
summary: FreshRealm, the exclusive maker of meal kits for Blue Apron, filed for bankruptcy with plans to sell its assets and settle a food-recall dispute that helped pressure the company into seeking court protection from creditors.

title: Euro Finance Chiefs Want Mythos Access to Prepare Defenses
title_cn: 欧元区财政部长希望利用神话来准备防御
summary: European finance ministers are pressing Anthropic PBC to let local companies see the new Mythos AI model so they aren’t exposed to digital attacks and fall behind US peers.

title: OpenAI Finalizes $10 Billion Joint Venture With PE Firms to Deploy AI
title_cn: OpenAI 与私募股权公司敲定 100 亿美元合资企业以部署人工智能
summary: OpenAI and Anthropic PBC are both forming joint ventures with some of world’s most recognizable financial institutions in a race to drive more adoption of their artificial intelligence tools.

title: Khosla Warns Software Pain Will ‘Taint Everything’ Across Credit
title_cn: 科斯拉警告说，软件问题将“玷污一切”信用
summary: Strategic Value Partners founder Victor Khosla expects years of elevated defaults in credit markets and is preparing to take advantage of opportunities created by greater dispersion among private credit managers.

title: Crypto Investor Haun Raises $1 Billion for New Funds, Expands to AI Agents
title_cn: 加密货币投资者 Haun 筹集 10 亿美元新基金，业务扩展到人工智能代理
summary: Katie Haun, a former Andreessen Horowitz general partner and federal prosecutor who made her name investigating digital assets before investing in crypto startups, has raised $1 billion for new venture funds.

title: Goldman, Blackstone Partner With Anthropic on AI Services Firm
title_cn: 高盛、黑石与 Anthropic 合作开发人工智能服务公司
summary: Anthropic PBC is partnering with Blackstone Inc., Hellman & Friedman and Goldman Sachs Group Inc. to form a new company that will bring artificial intelligence to a broad group of midsize companies.

title: Whatnot Has Americans Hooked on Livestream Shopping
title_cn: 美国人为何迷上直播购物
summary:
The app’s rapid-fire auctions are inspiring customers to spend big,
for better or worse.

title: Nvidia Rival Cerebras Seeks to Raise $3.5 Billion in US IPO
title_cn: Nvidia 竞争对手 Cerebras 寻求在美国 IPO 筹集 35 亿美元
summary: Cerebras Systems Inc. is seeking to raise as much as $3.5 billion in an initial public offering, as the artificial intelligence chipmaker and data center operator looks to counter rivals in the red-hot sector.

title: Government, Industry Need 'Partnership' to Address Affordability Concerns, Says Alsobrooks
title_cn: Alsobrooks 表示，政府和行业需要“合作”来解决负担能力问题
summary: Democratic Senator Angela Alsobrooks said the government and private industry need to work together to address longstanding hurdles to creating generational wealth, including the increasingly high barriers to home ownership. Talking live from the Milken Global Conference, Alsobooks said that she is open to hearing ideas from 'all sides,' including leaders in business and finance. Alsobrooks also discussed the status of stablecoin legislation in the Senate, saying that the bipartisan compromise bill she has worked on with Senator Thom Tillis is aimed at allowing innovation while protecting community banks. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Kentucky Republicans Flashing Warning Signs for GOP Candidates
title_cn: 肯塔基州共和党人对共和党候选人发出警告信号
summary: Some conservatives are conflicted about the war and the economy.

title: Iran Fires Missiles at UAE in First Attack Since Ceasefire
title_cn: 伊朗向阿联酋发射导弹，这是停火以来的首次袭击
summary: Iran attacked the United Arab Emirates for the first time in almost a month on Monday, as tensions between the US and Islamic Republic rose.

title: Trump Says He Looks Forward to Xi Summit Even as Tensions Mount
title_cn: 特朗普表示，尽管紧张局势加剧，他仍期待习近平峰会
summary: President Donald Trump said he’s looking forward to meeting Chinese counterpart Xi Jinping, signaling that his plans for the high-stakes summit are still on despite fresh tensions between the world’s two largest economies.

title: Russia Warns Ukraine of Retaliation If May 9 Parade Targeted
title_cn: 俄罗斯警告乌克兰如果5月9日游行成为目标将进行报复
summary: Russia and Ukraine announced distinct ceasefires on different days this week, with Moscow warning Kyiv not to violate its unilateral plans to stand down temporarily on Saturday when it marks the defeat of Nazi Germany in World War II.

title: White House Eyes Vetting AI Models Pre-Release, NYTimes Says
title_cn: 《纽约时报》称，白宫正在审查预发布的人工智能模型
summary: The Trump administration is considering an executive order to create a working group on artificial intelligence, according to the New York Times, a bid to boost oversight of the emerging technology.

title: Business Leaders Talk Geopolitical Risk at Milken | Balance of Power: Early Edition 5/04/2026
title_cn: 米尔肯商界领袖谈论地缘政治风险 |权力平衡：早期版本 5/04/2026
summary: On the early edition of Balance of Power,  Bloomberg's Joe Mathieu and Carol Massar discuss the geopolitical risk put in play by war with Iran and how business leaders are handling the economic impact. On today's show, partner at Oliver Wyman and senior fellow at the Atlantic Council Daniel Tannebaum and Democrat Senator from Maryland Angela Alsobrooks. Also, Bloomberg's Romain Bostick and Katie Greifeld talk to Chevron CEO Mike Wirth. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Trump Is Imposing Economic Pain on Iran, Cruz Says
title_cn: 克鲁兹称特朗普正在给伊朗带来经济痛苦
summary: US Senator Ted Cruz, chairman of the Senate Commerce Committee and a Republican from Texas, talks about the war in Iran and rising gasoline prices with Bloomberg Television at the Milken Conference. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Judge ‘Disturbed’ by Alleged Gala Shooter’s Jail Conditions
title_cn: 法官对晚会枪击案嫌疑人的监狱条件感到“不安”
summary: A federal judge said Monday he was “disturbed” after learning the man accused of attempting to assassinate President Donald Trump at a recent Washington gala is being held in solitary confinement in addition to other restrictive conditions while in custody.

title: Ackman Says Mamdani Should Not Force Griffin Out of NYC
title_cn: 阿克曼表示曼达尼不应强迫格里芬离开纽约
summary: Pershing Square CEO Bill Ackman says he feels “not great” about New York City Mayor Zohran Mamdani and his idea of taxing billionaires like Ken Griffin on their second homes here. Ackman tells Bloomberg Television that Mamdani should not be trying to drive Griffin out of New York. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Italy’s Meloni Vows Closer Ties With Azerbaijan in Energy Push
title_cn: 意大利梅洛尼誓言在能源推动方面与阿塞拜疆建立更紧密的关系
summary: Italian Premier Giorgia Meloni vowed closer cooperation with Azerbaijan as part of a broader energy diplomacy effort to address the supply squeeze caused by the Iran war.

title: Shipping Security in Hormuz Is a Concern, Chevron CEO Says
title_cn: 雪佛龙首席执行官表示，霍尔木兹的运输安全令人担忧
summary: Chevron CEO Mike Wirth has told the Trump administration that global oil supplies are “tightening” due to the Strait of Hormuz closure. He speaks to Bloomberg Television at the annual Milken Institute Global Conference in Beverly Hills. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Florida Sued Over DeSantis‑Backed Congressional Map Favoring GOP
title_cn: 佛罗里达州因德桑蒂支持的有利于共和党的国会地图而被起诉
summary: Liberal voters are suing Florida, alleging that new a congressional map signed Monday by Gov. Ron DeSantis (R) violates a state constitutional provision against political gerrymandering.

title: Canada Giving $1.1 Billion to Firms Hit by US Metal Tariffs
title_cn: 加拿大向受美国金属关税打击的企业提供 11 亿美元
summary: Prime Minister Mark Carney’s government unveiled measures worth C$1.5 billion ($1.1 billion) to help Canadian firms hurt by the Trump administration’s changes to US tariffs on imports containing steel, aluminum and copper.

title: Ackman Talks Succession Plan, Universal Music Bid and Mamdani
title_cn: 阿克曼谈论继任计划、环球音乐竞购和马姆达尼
summary: Pershing Square founder and CEO Bill Ackman says succession at the company is already in place. Speaking with Bloomberg's Dani Burger at the Milken Institute Global Conference in Beverly Hills, California, Ackman also discusses his bid for Universal Music Group, the rise of prediction markets and offers his views on New York City Mayor Zohran Mamdani. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Paranoia, Turmoil and Backlash: Inside the FDA Under Marty Makary
title_cn: 偏执、混乱和强烈反对：Marty Makary 领导下的 FDA 内部
summary: Insiders say one more high-profile misstep could put the commissioner’s job in jeopardy.

title: Germany Looks to Plug Gaps in Defenses If US Drops Missile Plan
title_cn: 如果美国放弃导弹计划，德国将弥补防御缺口
summary: Germany is assessing how to fill a potential defense gap if the US scales back missile deployments in Europe, warning it could weaken NATO’s deterrence against Russia.

title: US Has Opened a Passage Through Hormuz, Central Command Says
title_cn: 中央司令部称，美国已开通霍尔木兹海峡通道
summary: The US military helped two American-flagged ships go through the Strait of Hormuz as part of a broader effort to open a lane through the vital waterway, the commander of US Central Command told reporters.

title: Japan Official Cites Rule on Multiple Interventions Being One
title_cn: 日本官员援引多项干预措施为一的规则
summary: As currency traders continue to watch for potential Japanese moves to buy the yen, a Finance Ministry official from the nation on Monday cited a rule saying that three days of intervention count as a single operation.

title: Modi’s BJP Sees Milestone Win in State Election
title_cn: 莫迪领导的印度人民党在邦选举中取得里程碑式胜利
summary:
Indian PM Narendra Modi’s party has secured its first-ever election victory in the eastern Indian state of West Bengal.

The victory bolsters Modi’s standing as the nation’s most popular leader and expands the BJP's support base across the country. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Trump Ends Visa Freeze That Exacerbated Foreign Doctor Shortage
title_cn: 特朗普结束了加剧外国医生短缺的签证冻结
summary: The Trump administration lifted a visa processing freeze for foreign physicians, ending a months-long halt that had sidelined thousands of doctors and exacerbated staffing shortages at hospitals across the country.

title: Hungary Central Bank Files Complaint in Erste ‘Blackmail’ Case
title_cn: 匈牙利央行对 Erste“勒索”案提出投诉
summary: Hungary’s central bank said it has filed a criminal complaint after an internal investigation into alleged misconduct linked to the way its former leadership acted toward Erste Group Bank AG.

title: Europe Needs Bigger Banks, Cross-Border M&A, Top Official Says
title_cn: 高级官员表示，欧洲需要更大的银行和跨境并购
summary: Europe needs bigger banks and more cross-border mergers, a top euro-area official said when asked about UniCredit SpA’s potential acquisition of Commerzbank AG.

title: Taiwan’s Lai Heads Home After Defying China to Visit Africa
title_cn: 台湾赖清德不顾中国访问非洲后回国
summary: Taiwan President Lai Ching-te has departed Eswatini for home following a surprise trip to Africa in defiance of Beijing’s efforts to thwart his diplomatic outreach.
